boundary: Static local assumptions only; no live data, broker API, orders, predictions, portfolio optimization, tax/legal/investment advice, or buy/sell/hold recommendations.

commands.name: artifact-catalog
commands.summary: Inventory deterministic demo artifacts with routes, byte counts, SHA-256 hashes, producer commands, roles, and promotion usefulness.

commands.name: batch-compare
commands.summary: Rank scenario presets by total annual drag, total dollar drag, cash drag, turnover tax drag, and fee drag with review questions instead of recommendations.

commands.name: build-packet
commands.summary: Create Markdown and JSON fee-drag packet artifacts from holdings CSV and assumptions JSON.

commands.name: case-gallery
commands.summary: Render deterministic Markdown, JSON, and HTML gallery artifacts from bundled scenario presets.

commands.name: cold-start-walkthrough
commands.summary: Write a 10-minute Markdown/JSON first-run guide with expected outputs and safety boundaries.

commands.name: compare-history
commands.summary: Compare bundled or supplied historical scenario snapshots in a static Markdown table.

commands.name: decision-journal
commands.summary: Generate deterministic Markdown/JSON research-note prompts for human review and no-advice boundaries.

commands.name: docs-export
commands.summary: Create deterministic Markdown and JSON public documentation for commands, schemas, artifacts, verification, and finance boundaries.

commands.name: fixture-doctor
commands.summary: Validate holdings, assumptions, and scenario preset fixtures with actionable warnings.

commands.name: input-template
commands.summary: Write example holdings and assumptions templates plus a README fragment for adapting local CSV/JSON without live data.

commands.name: maturity-report
commands.summary: Write a public-readiness checklist for the current release scope.

commands.name: package-audit
commands.summary: Inspect zero-dependency metadata, package-data readiness, script wiring, version alignment, and command coverage.

commands.name: public-scan
commands.summary: Scan local release files for common secret markers and required finance boundary language.

commands.name: quickstart-check
commands.summary: Run the full deterministic demo route and write public-safe demo artifacts.

commands.name: release-audit-summary
commands.summary: Combine tests, selfcheck, public scan, manifest, visual receipt, fixture doctor, and package audit status.

commands.name: release-manifest
commands.summary: Hash source and demo files for release review.

commands.name: review-ledger
commands.summary: Validate and summarize the holdings ledger.

commands.name: scenario-presets
commands.summary: Write or print bundled deterministic scenario preset JSON.

commands.name: selfcheck
commands.summary: Verify CLI wiring, bundled examples, and deterministic calculations.

commands.name: sensitivity-matrix
commands.summary: Generate a static fee/return sensitivity table from a packet JSON file.

commands.name: static-dashboard
commands.summary: Render a standalone no-service HTML dashboard from a packet JSON file.

commands.name: static-showcase
commands.summary: Create a no-JS public showcase page linking key review artifacts with short user-value copy.

commands.name: visual-receipt
commands.summary: Hash and summarize visual demo artifacts with local routes, bytes, roles, regeneration commands, and safety boundaries.

finance_boundaries: Static local arithmetic scenario review only.
No live market data, broker connection, order execution, prediction, portfolio optimization, tax advice, legal advice, investment advice, or buy/sell/hold recommendation.
Outputs are deterministic examples from local CSV/JSON inputs and are not suitability analysis for any person or account.

calculation_notes: Weighted expense ratio is allocation-weighted across holdings.
Cash drag is cash-like allocation multiplied by max(gross_return - cash_return, 0).
Turnover/tax drag is turnover_rate * realized_gain_rate * tax_rate * taxable_allocation.
Rebalance drag is rebalance_cost multiplied by supported annual event count.

required_fields.description: Local annual return assumption for cash-like holdings.
required_fields.name: cash_return

required_fields.description: Share of turnover treated as realized gains.
required_fields.name: realized_gain_rate

required_fields.description: Local tax-rate assumption for turnover drag arithmetic.
required_fields.name: tax_rate

required_fields.description: Share of portfolio treated as taxable for turnover drag arithmetic.
required_fields.name: taxable_allocation

required_fields.description: Cost per rebalance event as a decimal.
required_fields.name: rebalance_cost

required_fields.description: Whether annual contributions compound for the current year.
required_fields.name: contribution_timing

columns.description: Account label used for review grouping.
columns.name: account

columns.description: Ticker or local proxy label; CASH marks cash-like holdings.
columns.name: ticker

columns.description: Portfolio allocation as a decimal; bundled examples sum to 1.0.
columns.name: allocation

columns.description: Annual expense ratio as a decimal.
columns.name: expense_ratio
